_comment: Invalid aesthetic-pack: type=pattern but routed as aesthetic. The schema's AestheticPack branch requires type=aesthetic; the Pattern branch will accept type=pattern, so this fixture actually validates against Pattern. This fixture tests the conformance-class-specific rule: a pack with type=pattern is NOT a valid aesthetic-pack provider regardless of what the schema's anyOf says.
name: @quoin/aesthetic-mislabelled
description: Type field misdeclared. Schema-level anyOf accepts this as a Pattern, but the conformance check rejects it as an aesthetic-pack provider.
